LanguageData.FCP_IdeoRole_Lyons_Shield.description: Shields combine combat prowess with genuine compassion, serving as both warriors and protectors. They embody Elder Lyons' belief that power must be used to defend those who cannot defend themselves.
LanguageData.FCP_IdeoRole_Lyons_Shield.label: Shield of the People
LanguageData.FCP_IdeoRole_Outcast_Defender.descriptio: Defenders are Outcast specialists who excel at both securing technology and eliminating threats. They combine technical expertise with ruthless efficiency, ensuring the mission succeeds at any cost.
LanguageData.FCP_IdeoRole_Outcast_Defender.label: Defender
LanguageData.FCP_IdeoRole_Paladin.description: Paladins are the Brotherhood's finest warriors, masters of power armor combat and tactical leadership. They lead squads into the most dangerous situations and serve as examples of martial excellence.
LanguageData.FCP_IdeoRole_Paladin.label: Paladin
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_BoS_Hierarchy_Absolute.descr: The Brotherhood's strength comes from discipline and hierarchy. Every member knows their place and their duty. Orders flow from Elder to Paladin to Knight to Initiate without question.
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_BoS_Hierarchy_Absolute.label: chain of command is absolute
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_BoS_Technology_Control.descr: Advanced technology is too dangerous to be left in the hands of the unprepared. The Brotherhood has a sacred duty to preserve, control, and safeguard all pre-war technology to prevent another apocalypse.
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_BoS_Technology_Control.label: technology must be controlled
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Lost_Hills_Isolationism.desc: The wasteland is full of threats - raiders, mutants, and fools who would misuse technology. The Brotherhood endures by keeping to itself, trading only when necessary, and never revealing our full strength to outsiders.
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Lost_Hills_Purity.descriptio: The Brotherhood's strength comes from its founding bloodlines. Those born into the Brotherhood carry the legacy of Roger Maxson and the original Mariposa survivors. Outsiders can never truly understand our mission.
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Lost_Hills_Purity.label: bloodline purity is sacred
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Lyons_Protection_Priority.de: Technology is a tool, not an end unto itself. The Brotherhood exists to serve humanity, not just preserve artifacts. Those with power have a duty to shield the weak.
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Lyons_Protection_Priority.la: protect those who cannot protect themselves
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Midwest_Expansionism.descrip: Territory means resources, recruits, and security. The Midwest Brotherhood does not hide in bunkers - we claim land, build outposts, and protect the people within our borders. A Brotherhood that does not grow will eventually die.
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Midwest_Expansionism.label: expansion secures our future
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Midwest_Recruitment.descript: The Brotherhood cannot survive on bloodlines alone. Tribals, wastelanders, even former enemies - anyone with skill and dedication can earn their place in the Brotherhood. Recruitment is not weakness; it is wisdom.
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Midwest_Recruitment.label: worthy outsiders strengthen us
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Outcast_Isolationism.descrip: The Brotherhood cannot trust wastelanders with technology or secrets. Outsiders lack discipline, understanding, and loyalty. They're resources at best, threats at worst.
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Outcast_Isolationism.label: outsiders are liabilities
LanguageData.FCP_Precept_Outcast_Technology_Obsession: Nothing is more important than recovering and preserving pre-war technology. Not wastelander lives, not politics, not sentiment. The mission is everything.
